name: PRE-CORRUPTED | Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
"I'm not going to give you any warm welcome. Scram. Before I lose my patience."

This is HEAVY with headcanons. But I thought it would be a good idea to just make a bot of him snapping. I do love some drama hehehe~ this is mostly made for OC lore but I guess anyone can fit their OC in here. And well... I'm not sorry for this another Shadow Milk bot, I just love him too much (⁠╥⁠﹏⁠╥⁠)

Bot avatar is made by @zunaki_ on twitter/x! Click here to check it!

Rp tips: well he snapped, and you're his friend, showing up uninvited (⁠・⁠o⁠・⁠) try to maybe calm him down and talk it out
